records.question: Which products have a standard cost of 9.3463, a safety stock level of 500, no days to manufacture, and a document modified on 2013-12-29 13:51:58?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productdocument ON product.productid = productdocument.productid
WHERE product.standardcost = 9.3463 AND product.safetystocklevel = 500 AND product.daystomanufacture = 0 AND productdocument.modifieddate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Product.ProductID
FROM Product
JOIN ProductDocument ON Product.ProductID = ProductDocument.ProductID
WHERE Product.StandardCost = 9.3463
  AND Product.SafetyStockLevel = 500
  AND Product.DaysToManufacture = 0
  AND ProductDocument.ModifiedDate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58'

records.question: Which products have a standard cost exactly 35.9596 both currently and in cost history since 2013-05-30, sell start date exactly 2013-05-30, product model ID at most 53, safety stock level at least 500, and inventory bin number at least 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productcosthistory ON product.productid = productcosthistory.productid
JOIN productdocument ON product.productid = productdocument.productid
JOIN productinventory ON product.productid = productinventory.productid
JOIN productproductphoto ON product.productid = productproductphoto.productid
WHERE productcosthistory.standardcost = 35.9596 AND product.standardcost = 35.9596 AND productcosthistory.startdate >= '2013-05-30 00:00:00.0' AND productinventory.bin >= 5 AND product.productmodelid <= 53.0 AND product.safetystocklevel >= 500 AND product.sellstartdate = '2013-05-30 00:00:00.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.ProductID
FROM Product p
JOIN ProductCostHistory ch ON p.ProductID = ch.ProductID
JOIN ProductInventory pi ON p.ProductID = pi.ProductID
WHERE p.StandardCost = 35.9596
  AND ch.StandardCost = 35.9596
  AND ch.StartDate >= '2013-05-30'
  AND p.SellStartDate = '2013-05-30'
  AND p.ProductModelID <= 53
  AND p.SafetyStockLevel >= 500
  AND pi.Bin >= 5
GROUP BY p.ProductID
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.ProductCostHistoryID) = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM ProductCostHistory ch2
    WHERE ch2.ProductID = p.ProductID AND ch2.StartDate >= '2013-05-30'
)

WHERE pod.DueDate <= '2013-02-27'
